mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (recipient_id, sender_id, type, target_type, target_id, title, content) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
AND is_read = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id} AND recipient_id = #{recipientId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, notify_comment, notify_reply, notify_like, notify_follow, notify_chat, notify_system FROM user_notification_settings WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification_settings (user_id, notify_comment, notify_reply, notify_like, notify_follow, notify_chat, notify_system) VALUES (#{userId}, #{notifyComment}, #{notifyReply}, #{notifyLike}, #{notifyFollow}, #{notifyChat}, #{notifySystem}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET notify_comment = EXCLUDED.notify_comment, notify_reply = EXCLUDED.notify_reply, notify_like = EXCLUDED.notify_like, notify_follow = EXCLUDED.notify_follow, notify_chat = EXCLUDED.notify_chat, notify_system = EXCLUDED.notify_system, updated_at = NOW()
